description: Multiple security vulnerabilities in VS Code extension npm dependencies have been patched. Upgrades include undici (7.27.0) for CRLF injection, WebSocket parser crash, and HTTP smuggling; and @nevware21/ts-utils (0.14.0), fast-uri (3.1.2), qs (6.15.2), and ws (8.21.0) for additional high and moderate severity CVEs.
name: Security fixes in VS Code extension dependencies
